events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess trench protection: spoil pile within 2 ft of edge. OSHA 1926 Subpart P requires spoil piles at least 2 feet from edge of excavation (1926.651(j)(2): Spoil and equipment shall be kept at least 2 feet from edge). If within 2 ft, non-compliant. Work rough-complete. Decision fail. Risk high due to cave-in hazard. component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 80. value 2 (distance in ft) or less; cue says within 2 ft of edge, so value <=2. Use 2.0? The measurable condition: spoil pile within 2 ft of edge. We can state value 2 (distance). confidence 0.9. findings: spoil pile too close, less than required 2 ft setback. actions: move spoil pile at least 2 ft back, inspect slope/protection, retrain. references: OSHA 1926.651(j)(2). Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.
